A stylish, expansive two bedroom unit with views over the harbour including Rangitoto. This unique property offers a large, well equipped, modern kitchen with dishwasher leading through to a sunny lounge with large windows and floor to ceiling glass sliding doors off either side. A covered carport is also offered and storage area for bikes or sea toys.

This is your opportunity to live in one of the most sought after areas in Auckland.

No smokers. Pets negotiable
